note: 130% Federal Poverty Level gross monthly income limits for CalFresh eligibility (2025-2026). Updated April 2026.
student_exemptions: Enrolled in federal work-study and currently working

april_2026_changes.daca: DACA recipients no longer qualify for federal CalFresh as of April 1, 2026. Refer to California Food Assistance Program (CFAP) instead.
april_2026_changes.visa_holders: Certain visa holders lost federal SNAP eligibility. CFAP may apply.
april_2026_changes.us_citizens_unchanged: No changes for US citizens and lawful permanent residents.
